query:
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.company, d.stage, d.value, d.confidenceScore,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings m WHERE m.dealId = d.id) as meetingCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stakeholders s WHERE s.dealId = d.id) as stakeholderCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snapshots sn WHERE sn.dealId = d.id) as snapshotCount
FROM deals d WHERE d.tenantId = 1 ORDER BY d.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kmzwkq9EWMaqpy.root --database PHTFs288hUf3yaW9yWMkJw --execute SELECT d.id, d.name, d.company, d.stage, d.value, d.confidenceScore,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings m WHERE m.dealId = d.id) as meetingCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stakeholders s WHERE s.dealId = d.id) as stakeholderCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snapshots sn WHERE sn.dealId = d.id) as snapshotCount
FROM deals d WHERE d.tenantId = 1 ORDER BY d.id;
